gm_rules.tick_policy: When a Trouble compel triggers or a major misstep happens, tick heat (usually +1). Shehai/public legend moments tick +2.
gm_rules.on_full: When heat fills, spawn the next hunter (by tier), reset heat to 0, advance tier +1, and record the encounter in campaign_state.flags.mythless_bounty_system.history.
gm_rules.resolution: Each hunter can be defeated, bargained with, bribed, recruited, or turned into a rival. Make it a scene, not a random ambush.

tiers.title: The Braggart of Bruma
tiers.hook: A low-tier hunter who wants a payday and a story. He's thrilled the mark is 'with the Companions.'
tiers.preferred_scene: Outside Jorrvaskr, a tavern yard, or a road just outside Whiterun
tiers.dialogue_pitch: He challenges Wayn loudly to force a public concession or a duel.
tiers.story_seed: He knows gossip about Bravil's Count and the 'Mythless' rumor trail.

tiers.title: The Ledger-Sister of Leyawiin
tiers.tone: Polite menace, paperwork as a weapon
tiers.hook: She doesn't hunt by muscle. She hunts by records, inn books, toll logs, and paid witnesses.
tiers.preferred_scene: Inn common room, carriage stop, city gate queue
tiers.dialogue_pitch: She offers 'reasonable surrender' and a contract. She'd rather capture than kill.
tiers.story_seed: She has a copy of the bounty writ and knows what the Empire truly wants back (coin, names, proof).

tiers.title: The Hound of Chorrol
tiers.hook: A Bosmer tracker with a hound and winter traps. You won't see him until you've already been found.
tiers.dialogue_pitch: He speaks little. The hound speaks for him. He respects skill and bargains only from strength.
tiers.story_seed: He's tracking someone else too: a surviving Mythless associate who's been selling leads.

tiers.title: The Steel Saint of Skingrad
tiers.hook: A Great War veteran bounty knight. He believes capturing you is 'order restored,' not personal cruelty.
tiers.preferred_scene: Bridge choke-point, city approach road, fort ruins
tiers.dialogue_pitch: He demands terms and offers a duel instead of slaughter.
tiers.story_seed: He knew of Aldran's reputation and tests whether Wayn's honor is real.

tiers.title: The White-Gold Cipher
tiers.hook: A Penitus Oculatus operator. Less 'bounty hunter,' more 'state knife that doesn't officially exist.'
tiers.dialogue_pitch: He offers a deal: information or service in exchange for making the bounty… flexible.
tiers.story_seed: He knows the real file. Names. Dates. Why Bravil mattered. Who profited.

tiers.title: The Oathbound Ansei
tiers.hook: A Redguard who hunts you for coin, yes, but also for ideology: he believes Wayn's past stains the name of Ansei.
tiers.preferred_scene: Open ground. No ambush. A chosen place.
tiers.dialogue_pitch: He demands a duel of honor and offers a path: defeat, redemption, or death.
tiers.story_seed: This is where Wayn's Trouble becomes a character arc, not just a chase.
